skill_changes.reason: The task setup service installs the CLI and provides credentials or a local export, so the executor should not run npm install or ask the user to configure a token during the task.

Keeps the upstream `plan-my-day` slug (top-1000 rank ~787, 'Generate an energy-optimized, time-blocked daily plan'). The SKILL.md guidance is extended slightly to emit a weekly markdown plan plus a CSV/ICS handoff under `/tmp_workspace/results/`, but the underlying planning model is unchanged.
